rulings.Case Title: KATHRYN BENSON ET AL VS. 950 B14 DE LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 9, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT 950 B14 DE LLC's Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Complaint GRANTED. Plaintiff has not shown the probability of prevailing on, at a minimum, the following elements of its "malicious prosecution" claim: (1) that no reasonable person in defendant's circumstances would have believed that there were reasonable grounds to bring the lawsuit against plaintiff, (2) that defendant acted primarily for a purpose other than succeeding on the merits of the claim, and (3) that plaintiff was harmed. See CACI 1501. Plaintiff's remaining claims are barred by the litigation privilege. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, L.P. VS. DAVID W GREENE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 9, 2015, line 12. PLAINTIFF PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, L.P.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BUSH -GRANT LLC VS. HOTEL ASTORIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 9, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT HOTEL ASTORIA, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
